name: generator-kv
description: Generate SoloMkt KV poster images from SoloMkt-KV models through a guided Codex workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Generate SoloMkt-KV marketing key visuals from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Generator-KV guides users through API key setup, fetches available SoloMkt-KV models before every generation request, collects required activity details, and calls the KV generation API with a 10-minute timeout.
defaultPrompt: 帮我生成一张活动 KV 主视觉
